goal: Determine why prompts previously classified as OCS_LLM_COGNITION route into DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION after SINGLE_PROVIDER_PRIMARY_MODE_V1.

human_prompt_to_routing.evidence: run_interactive_conversation calls route_conversational_cli_intent once for ordinary prompts and stores workflow_selection_artifact.workflow_id as authoritative_workflow_id.

routing_visibility.evidence: When conversational_routing_capture exists, routing visibility is rendered from the authoritative routing capture instead of an independent classifier.

ocs_dispatch.evidence: OCS dispatch runs only when authoritative_workflow_id equals OCS_LLM_COGNITION.

default_dispatch.evidence: DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION dispatch runs when authoritative_workflow_id equals DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION.

ocs_trigger_conditions.defect: Question-start detection checks normalized.endswith('?') after the caller strips terminal punctuation with rstrip('.?!'), making this path unreachable for normal question prompts.

default_provider_trigger_conditions.condition: All earlier certified workflow predicates fail.

classifier_probe.command: python classifier probe using route_conversational_cli_intent with replay_dir under /tmp/aigol-routing-consistency-*

results.prompt: I want to create the first real AiGOL product.
Can you analyze the first real commercial Sapianta product opportunity?

first_decision_point_causing_divergence.reason: OCS predicate returns false for representative cognition prompts; the router then reaches DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION.

single_provider_primary_mode_relationshi.reason: Single-provider primary mode is invoked only after OCS dispatch. Prompts selected as DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION never enter the OCS single-provider runtime.

minimal_safe_fix: Preserve question punctuation or pass an explicit ends_with_question flag into _is_ocs_llm_cognition_prompt.
Add narrow certified OCS markers for first real sapianta product, commercial sapianta product, sapianta product opportunity, and cognition output only.
Add regression tests for routing decision, workflow selection, routing visibility, and dispatch alignment.
Keep DEFAULT_PROVIDER_ASSISTED_CONVERSATION as the fallback for non-cognition prompts.

final_outputs.MINIMAL_SAFE_FIX: repair OCS predicate punctuation handling, add narrow Sapianta/cognition markers, and certify routing visibility/workflow selection/dispatch alignment with tests
